'''Gokus''' was the [[King/Legends|king]] of [[Alzar]] during the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. He at one time owned [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]. He was the father of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Plooz]].

==Biography==
During the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]], Gokus served as the king of Alzar. When C-3PO and R2-D2 arrived on Sooma as diplomatic couriers, his son was on the planet without Gokus realizing. The king threatened [[Zornog]] that if his son doesn't return safe, he would open war on the planet. C-3PO and R2-D2 proposed to bring the Prince back home, but on the way they were attacked by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Sludd]] and his forces. The droids and the prince managed to reach Alzar in time.

However, when they landed, King Gokus had C-3PO and R2-D2 arrested, believing that they were the ones that kidnapped his son. Plooz defended his new friends and revealed the truth that Sludd was the culprit.

{{Char-stub}}
